title: eriocaulon helichrysoides
intro: Eriocaulon helichrysoides, also known as the 'Gold Coin Grass', is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Eriocaulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriocaulon helichrysoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eriocaulon helichrysoides can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
